blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,253 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
